title: INVESTOR ALERT: Pomerantz Law Firm Investigates Claims On Behalf of Investors of Armstrong World Industries, Inc. - AWI
author: Pomerantz Llp
description: Pomerantz LLP is investigating potential securities fraud claims against Armstrong World Industries following the company's February 24, 2026 earnings report, where Armstrong disclosed softer-than-expected volumes, project delays in its Architectural Specialties segment, and an 'air pocket' in results. The disclosure triggered a 10% stock price decline ($18.53 per share drop to $174.30).

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company faces securities fraud investigation following disappointing Q4 2025 earnings results with softer volumes, significant project delays, and an unexpected 'air pocket' in results. Stock declined 10% on the news, and the investigation suggests potential disclosure issues or mismanagement.

title: AWI INVESTOR ALERT: Kirby McInerney LLP Investigates Potential Claims Involving Armstrong World Industries, Inc.
author: Kirby Mcinerney Llp
description: Law firm Kirby McInerney LLP is investigating Armstrong World Industries for potential securities law violations following the company's February 24, 2026 earnings report. Armstrong disclosed softer-than-expected volumes, delayed projects in its Architectural Specialties segment, and an 'air pocket' in results. The stock declined approximately 10% ($18.53 per share) on the news. The investigation is ongoing to determine if claims can be brought under federal securities laws.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company disclosed disappointing financial results including softer volumes, significant project delays that fell out of both the quarter and full year, and lack of expected operating leverage. Stock price declined 10% on the announcement, and the company is now subject to a securities investigation for potential violations of federal securities laws.

title: Worthington Enterprises Declares Quarterly Dividend; Charles Chiappone Joins Board of Directors
author: Globe Newswire
description: Worthington Enterprises announced a quarterly dividend of $0.19 per share, payable on March 27, 2026, and appointed Charles Chiappone to its board of directors, bringing extensive industry experience from Armstrong World Industries.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company declared consistent dividend, appointed experienced board member, and expressed confidence in growth strategies
Mentioned as previous employer of new board member, no direct performance commentary

title: This Fund Sold $6 Million in Armstrong Stock Despite Strong Earnings — Here’s the Takeaway for Long-Term Holders
author: Jonathan Ponciano
description: Denver-based 1060 Capital Management fully exited its position in Armstrong World Industries, selling 35,000 shares worth $5.7 million, despite the company showing strong quarterly performance and raising full-year guidance.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company showed strong quarterly performance with 10% net sales growth, 13% EPS increase, 22% free cash flow surge, and raised full-year guidance across multiple metrics
Mentioned as a new stake in 1060 Capital's portfolio without specific performance details
Mentioned as having a sizable put position by 1060 Capital without specific performance context
